content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures can be reconfigured to dynamically rank and prune intrinsic curiosity signals from ICM (Intrinsic Curiosity Module) and RND (Random Network Distillation) methods, solving the longstanding problem of noisy or redundant curiosity rewards in open-ended curious agents.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
